title: [Let's Do] Less vibrant flowers
description: A resource pack that slightly changes the colors of the flowers from the [Let's Do] mods, making them more faded.
body:
The resource pack was created for version 1.20.1, but should be suitable for others.
Does not require an OptiFine.

I really like the mods from satisfyu and his team, I can’t imagine my game without them. But the horribly bright colors of flowers very often scare me away from some biomes (especially meadow), and stand out too much against the background of the rest of the calm spectrum. That's why I created this little resource pack that makes the flowers more faded and vanilla,for the comfort of myrself and other people who also see this as a problem.

All textures and copyrights belong to [satisfyu](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu), the creator of the mods.
